name: Kathy Griffin
blurb: Kathy Griffin is an American comedian and actress known for celebrity-skewering, gossip-driven stand-up and a self-styled outsider persona.
bio: Kathy Griffin is an American comedian and actress known for celebrity-skewering, gossip-driven stand-up and a self-styled outsider persona. A former Groundlings member, she had a supporting role on the sitcom Suddenly Susan before building a prolific stand-up career and the Bravo reality series Kathy Griffin: My Life on the D-List. She holds a Guinness World Record for the most televised stand-up specials and has won two Emmy Awards.

timeline.ev: Joins the cast of the NBC sitcom Suddenly Susan
My Life on the D-List premieres on Bravo
Wins first Emmy for My Life on the D-List
Sets Guinness World Record for most televised stand-up specials

accolades: Two Primetime Emmy Awards for Outstanding Reality Program
Grammy Award for Best Comedy Album, Calm Down Gurrl (2014)
Guinness World Record for most televised stand-up specials
